title: No Federal Funds for Political Prosecutions Act
short_title: No Federal Funds for Political Prosecutions Act
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be
subjects: Presidents and presidential powers, Vice Presidents
crs_summary: No Federal Funds for Political Prosecutions Act This bill specifies that no funds or property received through equitable sharing by a state or local law enforcement agency with the authority to prosecute a criminal case may be used to investigate or prosecute a current or former President or Vice President, or a candidate for the office of President.
